message: Microsoft.Xrm.Tooling.CrmConnector.PowerShell requires PowerShell 5.1 Desktop edition (incompatible with pwsh 7 Core). Add '#Requires -PSEdition Desktop' to fail-fast on wrong-runtime invocation.

Microsoft.Xrm.Data.PowerShell requires PowerShell Desktop edition (v4 or v5 — not compatible with PowerShell Core/pwsh 7). Add '#Requires -PSEdition Desktop' to fail-fast on wrong-runtime invocation. A script importing this module under pwsh.exe silently exits at import time with no diagnostic. See: https://github.com/seanmcne/Microsoft.Xrm.Data.PowerShell and https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-apps/developer/data-platform/xrm-tooling/use-powershell-cmdlets-xrm-tooling-connect
